message:
feat(mesh): production XOR filter + IBLT set reconciliation for gossip

Replace the placeholder gossip filter with xorf-backed XOR filters and
add an Invertible Bloom Lookup Table (IBLT) for O(d)-communication set
reconciliation between nodes that differ by only a handful of objects.

The gossip module gains production protocol messages, state management,
and a full filter lifecycle. The IBLT module (391 lines) implements
insert, subtract, decode, and the complete reconciliation flow.

Includes a comprehensive multi-node harness test (1766 lines) simulating
the full gossip protocol across virtual mesh nodes, and criterion
benchmarks for XOR filter insert/query/digest, IBLT reconciliation at
varying diff sizes, and gossip round-trip at multiple scales.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
